name: Will & Trust Draft
tagline: Secure your assets and final wishes
desc: Draft your Will and Trust to protect your assets and clearly outline your intentions. Our Premium Probate Avoidance Package includes four additional critical estate planning documents for complete protection — ensuring your estate is thoroughly planned and your legacy is preserved.

name: Special Needs Trust
tagline: Protect a loved one's financial future
desc: A special needs trust allows parents, family members, and interested parties to contribute funds for a disabled loved one while preserving eligibility for Medicaid and SSI. It covers supplemental expenses that government benefits do not, providing lasting financial security.

name: Term Life Insurance
desc: A term life insurance policy provides affordable, straightforward protection for you and your loved ones. In the event of an unexpected death, your family receives a tax-free benefit ensuring financial stability. Choose the coverage term and amount that best fits your life stage.

name: Index Universal Life
tagline: Coverage that grows with the market
desc: Index Universal Life Insurance combines lifelong protection with cash value growth tied to a market index. You are shielded from downturns through a guaranteed floor while still capturing upside growth. Access your cash value anytime for true financial flexibility.

name: Fixed Index Annuities
desc: A fixed indexed annuity guarantees your principal and credited interest — your investment is never at risk from market losses. It also provides the potential for lifelong income withdrawals, giving you a dependable income stream throughout your retirement years.

name: Long Term Care
desc: A long-term care product provides financial coverage for extended healthcare including nursing home care, home health services, and assisted living. It protects your savings from high care costs so you receive quality care without placing a financial burden on your family.

name: Health Insurance (ACA)
desc: Affordable Care Act health insurance provides essential coverage for individuals and families. Plans include preventive care, prescription drugs, emergency services, and mental health coverage — often with income-based subsidies to make quality healthcare genuinely affordable.

name: Medicare Advantage
desc: Medicare Advantage combines Part A hospital and Part B medical insurance into one convenient plan from a private insurer. Most plans include Part D prescription drug coverage and additional benefits beyond Original Medicare such as dental, vision, and hearing care.

name: Partnership Program
desc: Join our team and jumpstart your career in finance. Through our powerful distribution system and partnerships with leading financial companies worldwide, you will gain access to training, mentorship, and the tools to build financially successful families across America.
